self_audit.stub_score: 0 (all tests verify actual implementation, not just existence)
self_audit.alternative_fix: The tests check specific patterns that are necessary for the fix - an alternative valid implementation would need to include is_full_rebuild(), pass apply_segment_scopes, change operation to Upsert, and retain record reader. These are structural requirements of the fix.
self_audit.anti_patterns: None detected - tests verify behavior through compilation, cargo tests, and source code analysis rather than shallow checks.
self_audit.manifest_sync: All 9 test functions have matching checks in eval_manifest.yaml

p2p_enrichment.notes: The repo's CI/CD uses cargo nextest which is not available in the base image. Added standard cargo check, clippy, and fmt as pass_to_pass gates. Full cargo test requires too much disk space (>20GB). All 3 p2p tests pass on the base commit.
